name: Yangtze River Delta
climate: Subtropical monsoon transitioning to temperate; hot humid summers with plum rain season (Jun–Jul), cold damp winters; typhoon risk Jul–Oct

neighbors.name: Pearl River Delta
neighbors.relevance: China's other major manufacturing cluster; competes in electronics, complements in heavy industry

neighbors.name: Greater Bay Area
neighbors.relevance: GBA and YRD are China's twin economic engines with interlinked supply chains

neighbors.name: South China Sea
neighbors.relevance: Shanghai and Ningbo ports route significant trade through the South China Sea

neighbors.name: Taiwan Strait
neighbors.relevance: YRD semiconductor and electronics sectors depend on Taiwan supply; shipping lanes pass nearby

neighbors.name: RCEP
neighbors.relevance: YRD is the primary Chinese hub for RCEP intra-regional trade and investment

links.description: Complementary manufacturing clusters with extensive domestic supply chain linkages
YRD chip fabs and electronics assemblers rely on Taiwan foundry output and IP
Container and energy shipments from Shanghai/Ningbo transit through South China Sea routes
Shanghai is China's primary port for RCEP trade with Japan, Korea, and ASEAN
Shanghai serves as maritime Silk Road hub; Yangtze connects inland BRI rail corridors
Energy imports from the Middle East and trade with Europe transit via Malacca to YRD ports
